jobs.title: Head Girls Wrestling Coach (no teaching assignment)
jobs.description: This Head Coach Girls Wrestling assignment is for the 2026-2027 school year with no expectation of a teaching assignment.WCSD coaches are required to meet all UHSAA certification requirementspriorto starting assignment and are required to maintain certifications during duration of employment.If any additional questions, applicants can contact the Athletic Director, Ryan Christiansen,  at ryan.christiansen@washk12.org.A stipend will be provided for this assignment.

jobs.title: Health and Safety Assistant and Paraprofessional
jobs.status: Paraprofessional - Part Time, 17.5 hours per week andHealth & Safety Asst - Part Time, 10 hours per week27.5 total hours per week.Minimum Requirements:High school graduation or other equivalent, (i.e., GED, college, technical or trade school, foreign equivalency, etc.).  Experience working with children.  Medical experience or training and clerical experience preferred.Must hold and maintain the following certificates:*Current First Aid certificate from the American Heart Association, American Red Cross, or other similar organization.*Current Cardiopulmonary Resuscitation (CPR)/Automated External Defibrillator (AED)certification from the American Heart Association, American Red Cross, or other similar organization.Certifications must be maintained for the duration of the assignment. jobs.title: Preventative Maintenance Technician
jobs.status: Full Time, 40 hours per week (year round, 239 day calendar)Minimum Requirements:High school diploma or general education degree (GED); or six months to one year related experience and/or training; or equivalent combination of education and experience.  Experience working with the necessary specialized tools.  Universal HVAC and/or ESCO certifications are preferred.  Must have and maintain an active Utah Driver's License.The salary for this position is assigned to Lane 2 of the MN Salary Schedule.To view the salary schedule, please select the following linkMN Salary Schedule.Attachment(s):Preventive Maintenance Technician.pdfEmail To A FriendPrint Version

jobs.title: Substitute Bus Driver Trainee
jobs.status: Part Time, On-Call/As NeededMinimum QualificationsMinimum age of 21 years.Have no more than 100 points recorded on past driving record.  No more than two at-fault accidents, two citations, or a combination of one at-fault accident and one citation, in a 24 month period.Hold and maintain a Utah Commercial Drivers License.  Driver Training will be provided if candidate needs to obtain the Utah Commercial Drivers License.The salary for this position is assigned to the BD Salary Schedule AFTER completion of training.To view the salary schedule, please select the following linkBD Salary Schedule.APPLICANTS ARE REQUIRED TO ATTACH/UPLOAD A COPY OF THEIR CURRENT DRIVING RECORD WITH THE APPLICATIONA copy of the driving record can be obtained from the Department of Motor Vehicles.Attachment(s):Bus Driver & Sub Bus Driver.pdfEmail To A FriendPrint Version
